description: Known-answer-test vectors for computeUwrScore under the version-pinned UWR profile uwr-weighted-lifts-v0.1 (UP-11 item 1). Pure data: expected values are decision-anchored literals; nothing in afi-config executes the engine. Includes the D2 M2 golden anchor (uwrScore 0.1875), the mandated anchor set, [0,1] boundaries, and one pre-clamp vector. With equal 0.25 weights the engine reduces to the mean of the four clamped axes; every vector's axis sum equals exactly 4x its anchor in decimal arithmetic.

engine.formula: uwrScore = (structureWeight*clamp01(structure) + executionWeight*clamp01(execution) + riskWeight*clamp01(risk) + insightWeight*clamp01(insight)) / (structureWeight + executionWeight + riskWeight + insightWeight)

comparisonPolicyNote: Expected values are decision-anchored data. Floating-point comparison policy is PR-UWR-KAT-EXEC scope (afi-core); this file deliberately defines none.

vectors.description: The D2 M2 golden replay anchor (afi-reactor/test/pipeheads/fixtures/golden.json @ 79c4a6f): uwrScore 0.1875 = mean(0.15, 0, 0.2, 0.4). Byte-stability of the D2 M2 goldens is an acceptance criterion (UP-5, UP-11).
Out-of-range inputs clamp to [0, 1] BEFORE averaging (UP-3: four clamped axes): (1.5, -0.5, 0.5, 0.5) clamps to (1, 0, 0.5, 0.5).
